en.GoodbyeMsg: TThe counsellor has left the chat now. Thank you for reaching out - we look forward to chatting to again.
en.EndChatMsg: You’ve ended the chat. Thanks for getting in touch today. If you ever need support again, we’re here for you.
en.ClosedOutOfShift: The helpline is out of shift, please reach us later.
en.UnsupportedMediaErrorMsg: Oops — we couldn’t send that message. Try sending it again using text only.
